title: Implement Eric Bellinger requested album tracklists, credits, and music-video URLs
context: The data file contains full best-effort public-source tracklists for these albums: It'll All Make Sense Later, The Rebirth 3: The Party & The Bedroom, The Rebirth 3: Remixes & More, 1(800)HIT-EAZY: Line 2, 1-800-HIT-EAZY, Eazy Call, and In the Meantime, Pt. 2. Each track includes primary artists, featured artists, available public-visible credits, credit status, and a music_video object with YouTube URLs when verified.
primaryGoal: Wire this data into the existing discography/detail-sheet experience so each requested album displays its complete tracklist, feature credits, public-visible song credits, and YouTube music-video actions where available.
rules: Do not invent credits or YouTube links.
Preserve the section order and heading hierarchy already used by the site.
Keep the existing visual design and interactions intact unless a minimal data-driven UI adjustment is required.
Use the new JSON as source of truth for these seven requested albums.
Do not overwrite unrelated albums unless merging by album title/id is required.
If an existing album already exists in src/data/discography.ts, merge the new track data into that album record rather than duplicating it.
For credits_status values that are partial or artist/features-only, render the data honestly and do not label it as complete liner notes.
Only show a YouTube button when track.music_video.youtube_url is a non-empty URL.

If track.music_video.has_music_video is true but youtube_url is null, show a subtle 'video needs verification' admin/debug note only if the app already has admin/debug states; otherwise hide it from the public UI.

implementationSteps.name: Preflight
instructions: cd /eric-bellinger
Confirm the data file exists at ./eric_bellinger_requested_album_tracklists_credits_videos.json or move it into the project root if needed.
Inspect package.json and existing src/data files to confirm whether the site uses TypeScript objects, JSON imports, or static arrays.

implementationSteps.name: Place data
instructions: Preferred: copy the JSON into src/data/ericBellingerRequestedAlbumTracklists.json.
Alternative: convert it into a typed TS export at src/data/albumTracklistsRequested.ts if the repo avoids JSON imports.
Make sure the source_registry and meta fields are preserved for future auditing.

implementationSteps.name: Create or update types
instructions: Create or update TypeScript interfaces for AlbumTracklist, TrackCredit, TrackMusicVideo, and RequestedAlbumTracklistData if needed.
Credits should support role, name, and optional source.
Music video should support has_music_video, youtube_url, youtube_video_id, youtube_status, video_type, confidence, notes, and optional non_youtube_evidence.

implementationSteps.name: Merge into discography data
instructions: Open src/data/discography.ts.
Find matching albums by normalized title and/or id.
For the seven requested albums, replace incomplete/placeholder tracklists with the new tracks array from the JSON.
Preserve existing cover art, platform links, release metadata, and animations if they are already better than the incoming data.
If an album is missing from the current discography, add it using the incoming album record.

implementationSteps.name: Update DiscographyDetailsSheet rendering
instructions: Open src/components/discography/DiscographyDetailsSheet.tsx.
Ensure the details sheet renders: track number, title/display_title, duration, featured artists, available credits, and music-video CTA.
Group The Rebirth 3: The Party & The Bedroom by disc_number if the data has disc 1 and disc 2.
For credits, render a compact line like: Featured: Mozzy | Writers: Eric Aldwin Bellinger Jr., Timothy Cornell Patterson | Producers: Dave O, Tariq, Dylan Graham.
If writers/producers are missing, do not show 'pending' unless the existing UI already uses metadata warning states.

implementationSteps.name: YouTube video behavior
instructions: Only render 'Watch Video' or 'Open on YouTube' when track.music_video.youtube_url exists.
If the app has an in-page YouTube modal, pass the youtube_video_id into the embed.
If no modal exists, open the YouTube URL in a new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer'.
Do not use non-YouTube evidence as a YouTube link.

implementationSteps.name: QA checks
instructions: Run the project typecheck/build/lint commands available in package.json.
Verify the seven requested albums render with complete track counts: 15, 24, 9, 14, 14, 15, and 3 respectively.
Verify no duplicate album cards were created.
Verify only tracks with YouTube URLs show a video button.
Verify The Rebirth 3 disc split does not break layout on mobile.
Verify the page still builds with no runtime console errors.

implementationSteps.name: Implementation report
instructions: Create /eric-bellinger/album_tracklists_implementation_report.md.
Report files changed, commands run, pass/fail status, album counts, video URL counts, and unresolved credits/video items.

acceptanceCriteria: The seven requested albums show full ordered tracklists.
Features are visible on track rows/details.
Available public-visible credits are displayed without claiming missing credits are complete.
YouTube buttons appear only where a verified YouTube URL exists.
Build/typecheck passes or the report documents exact failures.
copyPastePrompt: Hermes, implement the Eric Bellinger requested album tracklists and video data inside /eric-bellinger. Use /eric-bellinger/eric_bellinger_requested_album_tracklists_credits_videos.json as the source of truth. Copy it into src/data/ericBellingerRequestedAlbumTracklists.json or convert it into a typed TS export if that matches the repo. Merge the seven requested albums into src/data/discography.ts by title/id without duplicating albums: It'll All Make Sense Later, The Rebirth 3: The Party & The Bedroom, The Rebirth 3: Remixes & More, 1(800)HIT-EAZY: Line 2, 1-800-HIT-EAZY, Eazy Call, and In the Meantime, Pt. 2. Update DiscographyDetailsSheet so track rows display track number, title, duration, features, available public-visible credits, and a YouTube video action only when track.music_video.youtube_url exists. Do not invent writer/producer/personnel credits. Do not convert non-YouTube evidence into YouTube links. Group The Rebirth 3 by disc_number if useful. Preserve the existing design and section hierarchy. Run build/typecheck/lint if available and write album_tracklists_implementation_report.md with files changed, counts, commands, pass/fail, and unresolved items.
